tasks.label: docker-compose-down
tasks.command: docker compose down --remove-orphans --volumes

tasks.label: docker-prune-dangling
tasks.command: docker image prune -f

tasks.label: docker-network-prune
tasks.command: docker network prune -f

tasks.label: docker-verify-clean
tasks.command: docker ps -a --format 'table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}\t{{.Ports}}'

tasks.label: docker-build-nocache
tasks.command: docker compose build --no-cache api worker frontend

tasks.label: docker-up-db-broker
tasks.command: docker compose up -d postgres rabbitmq

tasks.label: wait-db-broker-health
tasks.command: timeout 180 bash -lc 'until [ "$(docker inspect -f {{.State.Health.Status}} rlapp-postgres 2>/dev/null)" = "healthy" ]; do sleep 2; done; until [ "$(docker inspect -f {{.State.Health.Status}} rlapp-rabbitmq 2>/dev/null)" = "healthy" ]; do sleep 2; done; echo "postgres and rabbitmq healthy"'

tasks.label: docker-up-api
tasks.command: docker compose up -d api

tasks.label: docker-up-worker-frontend
tasks.command: docker compose up -d worker frontend prometheus grafana seq postgres_exporter pgadmin

tasks.label: docker-health-status
tasks.command: docker compose ps

tasks.label: docker-ps-all
tasks.command: docker ps -a --format 'table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}\t{{.Image}}'

tasks.label: compose-up-remaining
tasks.command: docker compose up -d worker frontend prometheus grafana seq postgres_exporter pgadmin

tasks.label: compose-ps-all
tasks.command: docker compose ps --all

tasks.label: logs-worker-tail
tasks.command: docker logs rlapp-worker --tail 120 || true

tasks.label: logs-api-tail
tasks.command: docker logs rlapp-api --tail 120 || true

tasks.label: db-list-tables
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U rlapp -d rlapp_waitingroom -c "\dt"

tasks.label: db-check-constraints
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U rlapp -d rlapp_waitingroom -c "SELECT conname, conrelid::regclass AS table_name, contype FROM pg_constraint WHERE conrelid::regclass::text LIKE 'waiting_room_%' ORDER BY conrelid::regclass::text, conname;"

tasks.label: db-check-indexes
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U rlapp -d rlapp_waitingroom -c "SELECT indexname, indexdef FROM pg_indexes WHERE schemaname='public' AND tablename LIKE 'waiting_room_%' ORDER BY tablename, indexname;"

tasks.label: apply-migration-001
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -U rlapp -d rlapp_waitingroom < apps/backend/src/Services/WaitingRoom/migrations/20260228_001_CreateIdempotencyRecordsTable.sql

tasks.label: apply-migration-002
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -U rlapp -d rlapp_waitingroom < apps/backend/src/Services/WaitingRoom/migrations/20260228_002_NormalizePatientIdStorage.sql

tasks.label: db-describe-patients
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U rlapp -d rlapp_waitingroom -c "\d+ waiting_room_patients"

tasks.label: db-describe-idempotency
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U rlapp -d rlapp_waitingroom -c "\d+ waiting_room_idempotency_records"

tasks.label: reapply-migration-001
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -U rlapp -d rlapp_waitingroom < apps/backend/src/Services/WaitingRoom/migrations/20260228_001_CreateIdempotencyRecordsTable.sql

tasks.label: verify-idempotency-table
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U rlapp -d rlapp_waitingroom -c "\d+ waiting_room_idempotency_records"

tasks.label: db-integrity-queries
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U rlapp -d rlapp_waitingroom -c "SELECT 'dup_patient_canonical' AS check_name, COUNT(*) AS issues FROM (SELECT UPPER(TRIM(patient_id)) k FROM waiting_room_patients GROUP BY k HAVING COUNT(*)>1) t UNION ALL SELECT 'dup_event_aggregate_version', COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT aggregate_id, version FROM waiting_room_events GROUP BY aggregate_id, version HAVING COUNT(*)>1) t UNION ALL SELECT 'dup_event_idempotency_key', COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT idempotency_key FROM waiting_room_events WHERE idempotency_key IS NOT NULL GROUP BY idempotency_key HAVING COUNT(*)>1) t UNION ALL SELECT 'outbox_orphans', COUNT(*) FROM waiting_room_outbox o LEFT JOIN waiting_room_events e ON e.event_id = o.event_id WHERE e.event_id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'idempotency_duplicates', COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT idempotency_key FROM waiting_room_idempotency_records GROUP BY idempotency_key HAVING COUNT(*)>1) t;"

tasks.label: db-check-functional-index
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U rlapp -d rlapp_waitingroom -c "SELECT indexname, indexdef FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='waiting_room_patients' AND indexdef ILIKE '%upper(trim%';"

tasks.label: rebuild-api-worker-nocache
tasks.command: docker compose build --no-cache api worker && docker compose up -d api worker

tasks.label: backend-full-tests
tasks.command: cd apps/backend && chmod +x run-complete-test.sh && ./run-complete-test.sh --clean

tasks.label: frontend-tests
tasks.command: cd apps/frontend && npm test -- --runInBand

tasks.label: backend-tests-tail
tasks.command: tail -n 80 /tmp/rlapp-test/tests.log

tasks.label: backend-dotnet-test
tasks.command: cd apps/backend && dotnet test RLAPP.slnx --configuration Release --verbosity normal

tasks.label: frontend-npm-ci
tasks.command: cd apps/frontend && npm ci

tasks.label: frontend-tests-rerun
tasks.command: cd apps/frontend && npm test -- --runInBand

tasks.label: full-automated-tests
tasks.command: set -e; cd apps/backend && dotnet test RLAPP.slnx --configuration Release --verbosity minimal; cd ../frontend && npm ci && npm test -- --runInBand

tasks.label: backend-dotnet-test-rerun
tasks.command: cd apps/backend && dotnet test RLAPP.slnx --configuration Release --verbosity minimal

tasks.label: frontend-npm-ci-and-test
tasks.command: cd apps/frontend && npm ci && npm test -- --runInBand

tasks.label: backend-dotnet-test-final
tasks.command: cd apps/backend && dotnet test RLAPP.slnx --configuration Release --verbosity minimal

tasks.label: frontend-install-and-test
tasks.command: cd apps/frontend && npm install && npm test -- --runInBand

tasks.label: backend-dotnet-test-clean-run
tasks.command: cd apps/backend && dotnet test RLAPP.slnx --configuration Release --verbosity minimal

tasks.label: backend-dotnet-test-after-integration-fix
tasks.command: cd apps/backend && dotnet test RLAPP.slnx --configuration Release --verbosity minimal

tasks.label: backend-dotnet-test-post-fixes
tasks.command: cd apps/backend && dotnet test RLAPP.slnx --configuration Release --verbosity minimal

tasks.label: backend-dotnet-test-final-pass
tasks.command: cd apps/backend && dotnet test RLAPP.slnx --configuration Release --verbosity minimal

tasks.label: integration-tests-only
tasks.command: cd apps/backend && dotnet test src/Tests/WaitingRoom.Tests.Integration/WaitingRoom.Tests.Integration.csproj --configuration Release --verbosity normal

tasks.label: backend-detail-all-tests
tasks.command: cd apps/backend && ./run-tests-detail.sh

tasks.label: backend-detail-domain
tasks.command: cd apps/backend && ./run-tests-detail.sh --domain

tasks.label: backend-detail-application
tasks.command: cd apps/backend && ./run-tests-detail.sh --application

tasks.label: backend-detail-projections
tasks.command: cd apps/backend && ./run-tests-detail.sh --projections

tasks.label: backend-detail-integration
tasks.command: cd apps/backend && ./run-tests-detail.sh --integration

tasks.label: backend-detail-unit-only
tasks.command: cd apps/backend && ./run-tests-detail.sh --domain --application --projections --no-build

tasks.label: jwt-live-flow-check
tasks.command: python3 scripts/test/jwt-live-flow-check.py

tasks.label: jwt-live-flow-check-temp
tasks.command: python3

tasks.label: jwt-live-flow-check-temp-2
tasks.command: python3

tasks.label: clean-local-build-artifacts
tasks.command: find apps/backend -type d \( -name bin -o -name obj -o -name TestResults \) -prune -exec rm -rf {} + && find apps/backend -type f \( -name '*.trx' -o -name 'coverage.cobertura.xml' \) -delete && docker run --rm -v "$PWD/apps/frontend:/workspace" alpine:3.20 sh -c 'rm -rf /workspace/.next /workspace/coverage /workspace/test-results /workspace/playwright-report /workspace/tmp'

tasks.label: inspect-project-images
tasks.command: docker images --format '{{.Repository}} {{.Tag}} {{.ID}}' | grep -E '(^rlapp|/rlapp|rlapp-)' || true

tasks.label: purge-project-docker-builds
tasks.command: docker images --format '{{.Repository}} {{.ID}}' | awk '$1 ~ /(^rlapp|\/rlapp|rlapp-)/ {print $2}' | sort -u | xargs -r docker rmi -f && docker builder prune -af

tasks.label: verify-local-build-clean
tasks.command:
printf 'Backend residuals:
' && find apps/backend -type d \( -name bin -o -name obj -o -name TestResults \) | head -n 20 && printf '
Frontend residuals:
' && find apps/frontend -maxdepth 1 -type d \( -name .next -o -name coverage -o -name test-results -o -name playwright-report -o -name tmp \)

tasks.label: clean-backend-build-artifacts-fixed
tasks.command: find apps/backend -depth \( -type d -name bin -o -type d -name obj -o -type d -name TestResults \) -exec rm -rf {} + && find apps/backend -type f \( -name '*.trx' -o -name 'coverage.cobertura.xml' \) -delete

tasks.label: verify-build-clean-counts
tasks.command: printf 'backend_dirs=' && find apps/backend -type d \( -name bin -o -name obj -o -name TestResults \) | wc -l && printf 'frontend_dirs=' && find apps/frontend -maxdepth 1 -type d \( -name .next -o -name coverage -o -name test-results -o -name playwright-report -o -name tmp \) | wc -l

tasks.label: frontend-production-build
tasks.command: cd apps/frontend && npm run build

tasks.label: frontend-production-build-temp
tasks.command: cd apps/frontend && NEXT_DIST_DIR=/tmp/rlapp-frontend-next-build npm run build

tasks.label: frontend-production-build-alt
tasks.command: cd apps/frontend && rm -rf .next-build && NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-build npm run build

tasks.label: frontend-production-build-alt-2
tasks.command: cd apps/frontend && rm -rf .next-build && NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-build npm run build

tasks.label: frontend-targeted-tests
tasks.command: cd apps/frontend && npm test -- --runInBand test/config/env.coverage.spec.ts test/lib/httpClient.proxi.coverage.spec.ts test/security/api-auth.spec.ts test/services/waitingRoomSignalR.spec.ts test/infrastructure/signalRAdapter.spec.ts

tasks.label: frontend-signalr-adapter-test
tasks.command: cd apps/frontend && npm test -- --runInBand test/infrastructure/signalRAdapter.spec.ts --verbose

tasks.label: frontend-signalr-adapter-test-2
tasks.command: cd apps/frontend && npm test -- --runInBand test/infrastructure/signalRAdapter.spec.ts --verbose

tasks.label: frontend-targeted-tests-2
tasks.command: cd apps/frontend && npm test -- --runInBand test/config/env.coverage.spec.ts test/lib/httpClient.proxi.coverage.spec.ts test/security/api-auth.spec.ts test/services/waitingRoomSignalR.spec.ts test/infrastructure/signalRAdapter.spec.ts

tasks.label: frontend-waitingroom-signalr-test
tasks.command: cd apps/frontend && npm test -- --runInBand test/services/waitingRoomSignalR.spec.ts --verbose

tasks.label: docker-compose-config-audit
tasks.command: docker compose config

tasks.label: docker-compose-up-build-detached-audit
tasks.command: docker compose up --build -d

tasks.command: docker compose up --build -d

tasks.command: docker logs rlapp-frontend --tail 120

tasks.command: cd apps/frontend && rm -rf .next-build && NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-build npm run build

tasks.command: docker compose up --build -d

tasks.label: docker-build-frontend-tail
tasks.command: set -o pipefail && docker compose build frontend 2>&1 | tail -n 80

tasks.label: docker-up-frontend-only-tail
tasks.command: set -o pipefail && docker compose up --build -d frontend 2>&1 | tail -n 80

tasks.label: docker-compose-ps-tail
tasks.command: docker compose ps

tasks.label: frontend-http-check
tasks.command: curl -I http://localhost:3001

tasks.label: docker-up-frontend-only-tail-2
tasks.command: set -o pipefail && docker compose up --build -d frontend 2>&1 | tail -n 60

tasks.label: frontend-http-get-check
tasks.command: curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}\n' http://localhost:3001 && curl -I -s http://localhost:3001 | head -n 1
